zh.lifeSummary: 當Mrs Warin de Raleigh於大約1170年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特內特萊可姆時，她的父親Robert le Boteler41歲，母親Marie De Salour21歲。她於大約1190年與Warin de Raleigh在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1242年在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mrs Warin de Raleigh于大约1170年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特內特萊可姆时，她的父亲Robert le Boteler41岁，母亲Marie De Salour21岁。她于大约1190年与Warin de Raleigh在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1242年在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mrs Warin de Raleigh was born about 1170, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert le Boteler, was 41 and her mother, Marie De Salour, was 21. She married Warin de Raleigh about 1190, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1242, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mrs Warin de Raleigh est née environ 1170, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert le Boteler, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Marie De Salour, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Warin de Raleigh environ 1190, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1242, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mrs Warin de Raleigh um 1170 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert le Boteler 41 und ihre Mutter Marie De Salour 21. Sie hat um 1190 in Somerset, England Warin de Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1242 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mrs Warin de Raleigh è nata il circa 1170 nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert le Boteler, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Marie De Salour, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Warin de Raleigh circa 1190, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1242, nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Warin de Raleigh(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert le Boteler(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie De Salour(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 영국 서머세트에서 Warin de Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1242년 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Warin de Raleigh aproximadamente 1190, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1242, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mrs Warin de Raleigh родилась около 1170 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert le Boteler было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Marie De Salour, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warin de Raleigh около 1190 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1242 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

Se casó con Warin de Raleigh aproximadamente 1190, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1242, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
